code:
type Expr =
  | Num(value: Int)
  | Add(lhs: Expr, rhs: Expr)
  | Mul(lhs: Expr, rhs: Expr)

fn eval(_ expr: Expr) -> Int
  match expr
  when Num(value: v)
    v
  when Add(lhs: a, rhs: b)
    eval(a) + eval(b)
  when Mul(lhs: a, rhs: b)
    eval(a) * eval(b)
  end
end

let e = Expr.Mul(lhs: Expr.Add(lhs: Expr.Num(value: 2), rhs: Expr.Num(value: 3)), rhs: Expr.Add(lhs: Expr.Num(value: 4), rhs: Expr.Num(value: 5)))
let r = eval(e)
print("result=#{r}")
